offer: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, inconsistent scheduling of safety inspections causes compliance issues and potential fines. We simplify scheduling and logging instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inconsistent scheduling of safety inspections leads to compliance issues and potential fines.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among contractors
try_it: Let users try manual scheduling interface and logging on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a demo video showing manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
